name: Soft Molasses Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar in a mixing bowl until light and fluffy.
2. Blend in molasses and egg. Beat well.
3. In a separate bowl, combine flour, ginger, cinnamon, allspice, and cloves.
4. Dissolve baking soda in water.
5. Add the flour mixture and baking soda mixtures alternately to the butter mixture. Blend well after each addition.
6. Drop batter by rounded tablespoons onto lightly greased or foil-lined baking sheets.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 12 to 15 minutes, until done.
8. Remove from baking sheets and cool on wire racks.
9. Makes about 2 to 3 dozen cookies.
